name: @openhoo/mouserhoo
description: TypeScript SDK for Mouser API authentication, Search, Cart, Order, and Order History endpoints.

scripts.generate:types: mkdir -p src/generated && swagger2openapi --outfile /tmp/mouser-v1-openapi.json https://api.mouser.com/api/docs/V1 && openapi-typescript /tmp/mouser-v1-openapi.json --output src/generated/mouser-v1.ts && swagger2openapi --outfile /tmp/mouser-v2-openapi.json https://api.mouser.com/api/docs/V2 && openapi-typescript /tmp/mouser-v2-openapi.json --output src/generated/mouser-v2.ts
scripts.check: bun run biome:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test:coverage && bun run build
scripts.hooks:install: if git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then git config core.hooksPath .githooks; fi
scripts.verify: bun run generate:types && bun run typecheck && bun run test:coverage && bun run build
